PostToolUse.command: cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -30 || true
cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -30 || true
cd app && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -30 || true
cd app && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -30 || true
cd app && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -30 || true
cd backend && npx prisma validate 2>&1 || true

hooks.prompt:
Before allowing Claude to stop, verify the current work is complete and correct. Perform these checks:

1. TYPESCRIPT CHECK: Run 'cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit'. Report any errors.
2. PRISMA CHECK: Run 'cd backend && npx prisma validate'. Report any errors.
3. TEST CHECK: Run 'cd backend && npm test 2>&1 | tail -50'. Report pass/fail count.
4. CHECK FOR INCOMPLETE WORK: Search for 'TODO', 'FIXME', 'throw new Error("Not implemented")' in files changed during this session. If found in files that were supposed to be implemented (not stubs), flag them.
5. ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA: If a file '.auto/acceptance-criteria.json' exists, read it and check if any criteria have status 'pending'. If so, list them.

If ANY of checks 1-3 fail, or if there are pending acceptance criteria that should be done, respond with the reason explaining what needs fixing.

If this is a stop_hook_active=true (meaning we already ran this check and Claude tried to stop again), allow the stop to prevent infinite loops.

$ARGUMENTS
